notes: BattlEye, gets you into a match and then kills it and kicks you out.
title: PlanetSide Arena

notes: Installation without problems. But as soon as you start the game you fly with a game error - code G201 from the server. This is due to the anti cheat software BattleEye. As long as there is no proton support the game will probably not be playable.
title: PlanetSide Arena

notes: Game runs just fine from what i can tell, but BattleEye forcefully closes the game after a minute or two.
title: PlanetSide Arena

notes: After disabling esync, performance is great. Forcing large address awareness seems to help also. Unfortunately, the game just crashes every few minutes.
title: PlanetSide Arena

notes:
using tweaks I could get past initial setup, but during loading, the game crashes and gives an error code G201, which is an error related to BattlEye.

I was not able to get into any matches, although it did let me name my character the first time it was run.
title: PlanetSide Arena
